nasb.text: When I, Daniel, had seen the vision, I sought to understand it; and behold, standing before me was one who looked like a man.

esv.text: When I, Daniel, had seen the vision, I sought to understand it. And behold, there stood before me one having the appearance of a man.

cnv.text: 我但以理看見了這異象以後，就想明白它的意義；忽然有一位外貌像人的，站在我面前。

ccb.text: 我但以理看见这异象，正想明白它的意思，忽然有一个外貌像人的站在我面前。
